attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 		 ,             
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ,
NSOT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    ,        
NSOT.BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,
NSOT. SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  ,  
NSOT.SS_CODE SS_CD  ,
NSOT.START_SSP_DATE,
NSOT.START_TV_DATETIME,
NSOT.END_SSP_DATE,
NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME,
'=' AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,
NULL SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT ,
NULL ORDER_PROMOTION_CD,
NULL ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
NULL SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD,
NULL SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
-999 BILL_TO_CNTCT_PRSN_PARTY_KEY,
-999 SHIP_TO_CNTCT_PRSN_PARTY_KEY ,
NULL SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID ,
'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT ,
-999 SOLD_TO_CNTCT_PRSN_PARTY_KEY,
NULL SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM,
'=' DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG,
NULL BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR ,   /* ICW */
'=' AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,  /* ICW */
'=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG ,  /* ICW */
'=' AS TMIP_QUOTE_ROLE ,  /* ICW new changes */
NULL AS RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM ,  /* ICW */
NULL AS RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM,  /* ICW */
NULL AS ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
'N' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
-999 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
NULL AS ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
NULL AS ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT /* Rel10 REPAIR */
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV  NSOVT
WHERE NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSOVT.SS_CD NOT IN ('OPL'))
AND NSOT.SS_CODE NOT IN ('OPL')

SELECT
SALES_ORDER_KEY ,              
BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,              
BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,          
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,              
SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT , 
SS_CD  ,                    
START_SSP_DATE  ,              
START_TV_DTM  ,                
END_SSP_DATE   ,               
END_TV_DTM    ,                
AUTO_BOOK_FLAG     ,           
SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT , 
ORDER_PROMOTION_CD     ,       
ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT ,       
SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD ,           
SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT   ,
BILL_TO_CNTCT_PRSN_PARTY_KEY  ,
SHIP_TO_CNTCT_PRSN_PARTY_KEY  ,
SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID  ,
SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT   ,
SOLD_TO_CNTCT_PRSN_PARTY_KEY  ,
SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,       
DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG ,           
BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD  ,
NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR ,   /* ICW */
'=' AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,  /* ICW */
'=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG ,  /* ICW */
NULL AS RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM ,  /* ICW */
NULL AS RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM,  /* ICW */
-999 AS ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT, /*  Rel10 REPAIR */
'N' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
-999 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
-999 AS ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* Rel10 REPAIR */
-999 AS ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT /* Rel10 REPAIR */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NSOT_CORE
